title: MKD-117 Mature AV Debut Documentary Don't Get The Camera So Close! It's Embarrassing To Have Your Face Reflected... Rie Takahashi
overview: Rie Takahashi who makes her AV debut in this work. He is so shy that he asks teary-eyed, "Don't take pictures of my face as much as possible..." at the meeting before the shoot. Petite but plump and plump body is preeminent sensitivity!
